title: Rest up!
description: A mod that aims to make sleeping and eating more impactful and convenient!
body:
This mod implements some changes to make sleeping and eating more beneficial and convenient!

## Features:
- Players only have 6 hearts by default
- When sleeping in a bed, you get health boost for 3 days, which can boost you up to 20 hearts if lucky! You have a better chance to get more hearts if you're well fed when you go to sleep!
- Sleeping removes all your potion effects, including health boost.
- Sleeping drains your hunger down to 3 haunches
- You need at least 4 haunches of hunger to sleep
- Upon filling your hunger bar, you won't have to eat until the next phase of day! (morning, day, night, midnight, etc)
